ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Markers become ::token and ::/token. Changing this does not update existing notes.
ast.target: 标记变为 ::token 和 ::/token。更改此设置不会更新现有笔记。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Player copies mirror your vault structure inside this folder. Publish only this folder.
ast.target: 玩家副本在此文件夹内镜像您的保险库结构。仅发布此文件夹。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add player visibility actions to the editor context menu.
ast.target: 将玩家可见性操作添加到编辑器上下文菜单。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Regenerate a note's player copy whenever the note changes.
ast.target: 每当笔记更改时，重新生成其玩家副本。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Toggle player-facing on selection or block
ast.target: 切换选中或块的玩家朝向

ast.name: name
ast.target: 切换整个笔记的玩家朝向

ast.name: name
ast.source: Sync player copy of current note
ast.target: 同步当前笔记的玩家副本

ast.name: name
ast.target: 同步所有玩家副本（整个保险库）
